steps.title: Vertex shortcut: find the axis of symmetry
Read the maximum directly from vertex form
steps.content: Vertex form is $a(x-h)^2+k$, and the maximum value is the constant $k$ when the parabola opens downward. Here the equivalent form is $-5(x-5)^2+45$, so the maximum value is displayed as $45$. That matches Choice C — $f \left(x\right)=-5{ \left(x-5\right)}^{2}+45$, so C.
